title: Maine Chapter of the Association of Disability Examiners (McADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the Maine Chapter of the Association of Disability Examiners (McADE), part of the Northeast Region of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Includes a preamble and covers chapter name, geographic boundaries (State of Maine), purpose, membership, control vested in the Board of Directors, limitations, officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary-Treasurer), the annual meeting, duties of officers and the Board, standing committees (including the 'Mainely N.E. Issues' publication), amendments, and rules of order.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Maine Chapter (McADE)
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Maine Chapter of the Association of Disability Examiners (McADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Maine-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived and the source contains OCR-style artifacts (e.g. 'ASSCCIATION', 'prograTns') that were preserved as-converted. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
